---
title: "\'Cathedral Sketches\'"
---

## \'Cathedral Sketches\'

**Author:** Elizabeth P. Roberts
**Imprint:** <i>MP</i> (January 1855-February 1861)

### Notes

\'Cathedral Sketches\' was a series of 15 articles on English cathedrals which ran in <i>MP</i> between January 1855 and February 1861.  \'E.P. R.\' (<i.>i.e.</i> Elizabeth P. Roberts), CMY herself, and \'A. M. G.\'(<i>i.e.</i> A. M. Goodrich) were among the contributors.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
